sections.title: If the player has no coins in their possession

lines.speaker: Hanchen the Hound
lines.text: Have you coin?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It seems I'm all out.

lines.speaker: Hanchen the Hound
lines.text: Then we have nothing to discuss.

sections.title: If the player has less than 1-10 coins in their possession

lines.speaker: Hanchen the Hound
lines.text: Have you coin?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Umm, just a little, why?

lines.speaker: Hanchen the Hound
lines.text: Not nearly enough, we have nothing to discuss.

sections.title: If the player has more than 10 coins in their possession

lines.speaker: Hanchen the Hound
lines.text: Have you coin?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Umm, just a little, why?

lines.speaker: Hanchen the Hound
lines.text: I'd rather not waste time in conversation with someone who can't pay for information.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who said I need information?

lines.speaker: Hanchen the Hound
lines.text: You travelling types, all you have is questions.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I guess I'm a little curious about your companion.

lines.speaker: Hanchen the Hound
lines.text: The jester? The journey has put him off performing, for the better, I'd say.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That was hardly worth it.

lines.speaker: Hanchen the Hound
lines.text: I never promised worthwhile information.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know much about the Painted One in the town center?

lines.speaker: Hanchen the Hound
lines.text: Oh yes, he came with us. He tends to find himself in strange situations, but he can handle himself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you care more for gold than you do your friend?

lines.speaker: Hanchen the Hound
lines.text: Apparently.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not giving you my money.

lines.speaker: Hanchen the Hound
lines.text: Then we have nothing to discuss.
